charter: The Shared Residual (working title; Will's to confirm)

economics_pins.holonomy_denominator_bits_per_step: ~2^-q -> denominator bits grow ~1 per dyadic bit + cf-denominator base

execution.byte_stability: every battery x2; sha256 over records
execution.imports: stdlib only (fractions); referee exact-ℚ; mpmath referee-side only if a transcendental fixture is ever added (not in FX-G-A)
execution.seam_tests: AST-asserted: probe never imports a referee that shares its arithmetic; verdict path independent

kill_conditions.K-G1: HALT (campaign dies): any additively-separable cell with holonomy != 0 in Q. The construction would be manufacturing coupling from bookkeeping; the foundational claim dies, the campaign stops, chain preserved.
kill_conditions.K-G2: HALT (arm): any coupled cell where holonomy != the derived cross-term in Q (reading gap != account gap). Exact accountability broken.
kill_conditions.K-G3: REFUTE-ROW (continue): CL-G3 fails - coupling-holonomy and the rounding fingerprint stay entangled even under the protection predicate. The clean-representation-layer-primitive reading is REFUTED, scope reduced, chain preserved. (Stage B.)
kill_conditions.K-G4: REFUTE-ROW: CL-G5 fails - Richardson refusal bleeds into the analytic/algebraic accounts. (Stage C.)
kill_conditions.K-G5: DESCOPE (pre-declared): exact/high-precision bit growth exceeds the Stage-0 pinned budget before the planned depth -> horizons shorten per the pre-registered schedule, never silently.

rulings_applied.CL_G6: product-formula resonance = registered measurement only (§6.5, F9 discipline)
rulings_applied.naming: working labels only (F14); no name adopted

spine_fence: SPINE FENCE (brief §5; structural analog of Arm M's T2). This arm MEASURES coupling-holonomy and boundary behaviour on named fixtures. It carries NO claim that the coupling primitive is the universal substrate spine, and NO cross-domain G-claim. 'Encoding-agnostic' is a NAVIGATION TARGET the fixtures test (FX-G-E specifically), not an asserted invariant. [INFERENCE] stays [INFERENCE]. The spine is confirmed only at the charter level and only if BOTH arms survive; this arm alone does not confirm it. 'The metric is unnecessary' is a framing, not a theorem this arm proves: the arm measures the holonomy (which provably needs only the connection), nothing metaphysical.

informativeness_control_fails.lesson: without the live-axis gate, a dead axis manufactures a spurious holonomy==0 and mis-reads coupled as separable
